channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

Iran says it is closing the Strait of Hormuz and has accused the US and Israel of violating the ceasefire signed earlier this week. The Iranian military said the Strait is closed to all vessels, citing continuing Israeli strikes in Lebanon. The Strait of Hormuz is one of t - instagram.com
